word: G577 - ἀποβάλλω - apobállō - ap-ob-al'-lo - Cast away

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἀποβάλλω

- Transliteration: Apoballo

- Phonetic: ap-ob-al'-lo

- Definition:

1. to throw off, cast away

- Origin: from G575 and G906

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G575 and G906; to throw off; figuratively to lose: - cast away.
